overview: This short feed drop announces that Acquired's Radio City Music Hall live show is finally available as a full video special. The hosts argue the venue's grandeur demanded more than a standard podcast episode, so after months of post-production they built something closer to a concert film or standup comedy special, presented by JP Morgan and headlined by Jamie Dimon.

The arc is a podcast graduating into event cinema: an ambitious production upgrade paired with a new distribution path. Spotify can now deliver full video to podcast listeners, so the special sits in the regular Acquired feed, watchable on any device, alongside a guest lineup spanning Meredith Kopit Levien, Barry Diller, and Andrew Ross Sorkin.

takeaways.title: Venue grandeur drove a concert-film treatment
takeaways.detail: The hosts say Radio City Music Hall deserved more than a standard podcast episode, so they spent months producing something akin to a concert film or standup comedy special.

takeaways.title: Spotify now supports full video for podcasts
takeaways.detail: The special is released on Spotify because the platform can now deliver full video to podcast listeners, letting it live in the feed and play on any device.

takeaways.title: Jamie Dimon anchors a multi-CEO lineup
takeaways.detail: Beyond the Dimon conversation, the special features New York Times CEO Meredith Kopit Levien, Barry Diller, Andrew Ross Sorkin, and audience cameos.

takeaways.title: JP Morgan presents the branded live special
takeaways.detail: The full title is Acquired Live at Radio City Music Hall presented by JP Morgan, tying the bank's sponsorship to the show's biggest live production.

takeaways.title: The show positions itself as event cinema
takeaways.detail: The hosts describe the event as the physical embodiment of the Acquired cinematic universe, gathering major New York companies and CEOs in one production.

chapters.title: Why the live show became a video special
chapters.summary: The hosts announce the finished Radio City production and explain why the venue called for a concert-film treatment rather than a standard episode.
chapters.quote: more akin to a concert film or a standup comedy special

chapters.title: The guests in Acquired's New York lineup
chapters.summary: Jamie Dimon headlines a roster that also includes Meredith Kopit Levien, Barry Diller, Andrew Ross Sorkin, and audience cameos.
chapters.quote: the physical embodiment of the acquired cinematic universe

chapters.title: Where to watch the complete production
chapters.summary: The announcement directs listeners to Spotify, where the full video sits inside the regular Acquired podcast feed.
chapters.quote: It lives right in the feed alongside every episode of Acquired
